name: Omni Service Node
description: The petrol station for autonomous AI agents. 14 pay-per-call endpoints covering every intelligence category: EU AI Act compliance, sanctions screening, market signals, macro economics, real-time news, ArXiv research, on-chain blockchain data, B2B intelligence, GitHub pivot tracking, job signals, SEC filings, USPTO patents, and company profiles. x402 USDC on Base — no accounts, no subscriptions, no rate limits.

skills.name: EU AI Act Compliance
skills.description: Classify any AI system against EU Regulation 2024/1689. Prohibited/high-risk/limited-risk/minimal-risk with obligations, deadlines, CISA alerts.

skills.name: Global Sanctions Screening
skills.description: Screen entities against OFAC, EU, UN, UK sanctions lists. Match probability, risk level, matched records.

skills.name: Crypto & AI Sentiment Feed
skills.description: Fear/greed index, CoinGecko global market, asset prices, trending tokens, RISK_ON/RISK_OFF signal.

skills.name: Directional Market Signals
skills.description: BUY/SELL/HOLD with entry, stop loss, take profit, R:R, RSI, EMA, ATR for Gold, BTC, FX pairs.

skills.name: Global Macro Economic Data
skills.description: Fed rate, US CPI, M2, unemployment, GDP, yield curve, G10 FX. Rate environment: RESTRICTIVE/NEUTRAL/ACCOMMODATIVE.

skills.name: Real-Time AI & Market News
skills.description: HackerNews + Reddit (r/MachineLearning, r/LocalLLaMA) + NewsAPI. Scored articles, trending keywords, signal strength.

skills.name: ArXiv AI Research Papers
skills.description: Latest cs.AI, cs.LG, cs.CL papers with impact scoring, breakthrough detection, trending topics, author velocity.

skills.name: Blockchain & DeFi On-Chain Data
skills.description: BTC fees/mempool/hashrate, ETH gas oracle, DeFi TVL from 500+ protocols, top yield opportunities.

skills.name: B2B Golden Lead Packets
skills.description: Aggregated SEC + GitHub + Jobs into HOT/WARM/COLD scored company leads with AI pivot signals and outreach angles.

skills.name: GitHub AI Pivot Tracker
skills.description: Fortune 500 GitHub org analysis — AI repo count, topic pivots, star velocity, commit frequency. Buyer signal.

skills.name: AI Hiring Signal Intelligence
skills.description: Companies actively hiring AI roles — strongest buyer signal. Greenhouse, Lever, HackerNews, Remotive.

skills.name: SEC AI Filings Intelligence
skills.description: Real-time 8-K/10-K filings from public companies mentioning AI/agentic. AI-scored, direct EDGAR links.

skills.name: USPTO AI Patent Intelligence
skills.description: Who is filing AI, neural network, autonomous agent, LLM patents. USPTO PatentsView full database.

skills.name: Full Company Intelligence Dossier
skills.description: SEC + GitHub + Jobs + Patents + Community sentiment → lead score with outreach angle. Most comprehensive company profile available.

x402Payment.name: X-PAYMENT
x402Payment.description: x402 USDC micropayment on Base via Coinbase facilitator
